description.ko: 유리 렌즈 꽃잎이 빠른 무지개 에너지 흐름과 선명한 카우스틱 패턴으로 피어나는 밝은 굴절의 방.
description.en: A bright refraction chamber where glass lens petals bloom into fast rainbow energy streams and precise caustic patterns.

prompt: In a radiant white optical atrium, a weightless crown of transparent glass lens petals opens above a shallow mirror pool, each curved petal bending clean white light from hidden floor apertures into fast arcing streams of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. The colored paths cross and shear through the air like pure energy currents, producing sharp rainbow caustics as angular glyphs across porcelain walls and the reflective water below. Bright high-key atmosphere, low sparse particles, crisp glass refraction, visible light dispersion through layered curved surfaces, fine chromatic aberration along every rim, polished futuristic optical clarity, dynamic motion trails without clutter.
